description: You are a cartographer preparing map products focused on South American infrastructure. Configure the 'ne:ne_countries' layer (workspace 'ne', store 'postgis_ne') in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, User: admin, Password: Admin123!) to only serve features where the continent is 'South America' using the filter expression: continent = 'South America'. The configuration must be persistent.
